default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the Evolution API + HostGator partnership model and launch strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Model:** Davidson's role is evolving from affiliate to a Weaver Check (revenue share) partner for the new Evo CRM SaaS, with an affiliate LP as an interim step.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**Pricing Strategy:** The Evo CRM model will shift from agency-only bundles (\~R$800–1000) to a per-account model to capture HostGator's 500k+ customer base.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:** A major launch is set for early April, featuring a live demo for Davidson's community (YouTube, WhatsApp, Discord) and aggressive, timed discounts to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** HostGator will handle customer acquisition and infrastructure (hosting all Evo CRM instances), allowing Davidson to focus on product development.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Evolution

  - [The partnership is evolving beyond a standard affiliate relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**Current:** Affiliate model with a dedicated LP for Davidson.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**Future:** Weaver Check (revenue share) model for the new Evo CRM SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Goal:** Explore deeper collaborations beyond commissions, such as joint workshops and events.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Evo CRM Pricing & Market Strategy

  - [The current Evo CRM pricing model (agency bundles, \~R$800–1000) is a barrier to scaling with HostGator's large customer base.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Problem:** The model misses the 480k+ individual customers who need only 1–2 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift to a per-account pricing model, mirroring the successful Titan email partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [**Rationale:** HostGator provides customer acquisition and infrastructure, freeing Davidson to focus on product development.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### Launch Plan & Community Engagement

  - [**Launch Date:** Early April.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Launch Event:** A live demo on Davidson's YouTube channel showcasing the "plug and play" Evo CRM installation on HostGator.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Promotional Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
      - [Aggressive, timed discounts to drive initial adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Integration guides in all Evolution API documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Cross-promotion on community channels (WhatsApp, Discord).](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Convert users from other VPS providers (e.g., Hetzner) by highlighting Evo CRM's superior ease of use and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

### Product & Infrastructure

  - [**Hosting:** All Evo CRM instances will be hosted on HostGator VPS.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**White Label:** The initial Evo CRM launch will be branded; a future white-label version for HostGator is a possibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**Agency Package Idea:** Davidson proposed a "business in a box" for agencies, bundling Evo CRM with a custom website, payment gateway, and domain, leveraging HostGator's services.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fernando da Silva:** Schedule a follow-up meeting this week with Davidson and Daniel to define the Weaver Check (revenue share) model.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [**Davidson:** Share the Evo CRM launch roadmap and date with the HostGator team.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**HostGator Team:** Share the completed affiliate LP for Davidson's review.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [**All:** Create a new WhatsApp group for commercial/marketing discussions to keep topics focused.](https://fathom.video/share/yBfr8uyZTzypxMRShEFQVPJTPuiHKRdX?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

action_items.description: Share affiliate LP preview w/ Davidson; then send affiliate link
Update install docs/tutorials to recommend HostGator VPS; include affiliate link
Evaluate HostGator auto-deploy for upcoming live; if viable, feature
Draft 30-day launch discount proposal for Evo CRM; share w/ Davidson
Create separate WhatsApp group for commercial/marketing w/ Davidson, Daniel, Fernando Levart
Send Evo CRM roadmap/dates to Daniel, Fernando Levart; then schedule launch live
Schedule RevShare modeling call w/ Davidson, Daniel this week
